description.0: Legend has it that this greatsword was forged by the hand of Ravenwood, who inherited the name of Boreas, prior to his ascension to knighthood.

0.0: Increase ATK SPD by 10%. Every time the equipping character's Normal Attack(s) hit opponent(s), when they cast their Elemental Skill, or when they begin their Charged Attack(s), gain 1/2/2 stacks of Four Winds' Hymn respectively: DMG dealt is increased by <cryo>7.5%</cryo> for 4s. Max 4 stacks. This effect can be triggered once every 0.01s.
0.1: Additionally, when the party has the "Hexerei: Secret Rite" effect, each stack of Four Winds' Hymn also increases the equipping character's CRIT DMG by <cryo>7.5%</cryo>.
